name: Deep Research Dry Run
description: Coordinate parallel research, cross-checking, and synthesis before execution support exists.

phases.description: Research current evidence from independent angles.
phases.prompt: Investigate the topic and collect evidence with citations.

phases.description: Cross-check the research findings for contradictions.
phases.prompt: Review research outputs and identify unsupported claims.

phases.description: Synthesize the reviewed findings into a final answer.
phases.prompt: Produce a concise synthesis using only validated claims.

output.description: A concise research brief with verified claims.
